customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, working well, and appreciate its ease of use and professional installation process. Moreover, they consider it an affordable water purifier with amazing water quality after purification, and one customer mentions it saves money on canned or packaged water. However, opinions about service are mixed, with some customers reporting very bad service while others find it satisfactory.

reviews.author: Sonu y.
reviews.title: Good product but tds setup needed
reviews.body: Good product but need tds controler in it

reviews.author: Ashok
reviews.title: Basic RO purifier which does the job
reviews.body: This is basic RO water purifier from Aquaguard. my usage was mainly with municipal water but to protect against contaminated Kaveri water (TDS wise RO was not required but from other mineral contamination and impurities), I had gone with RO purifier. Although it claims its 60% higher water recovery compared to normal RO, its actually other way, this for municipal water, it wastes 1.5 x (for 1 litre water purified, it wastes 1.5 litre water out). i got this for exchange and got it at good discount during May'26 sales for 6.9K. installation was promt and there was no over selling of anything. It

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Satisfactory
reviews.body: Product was good, my tap water TDS was 1400 and its was giving 250 TDS after filter process. I am fine with product.

reviews.author: saif ansari
reviews.title: Satisfied with the product
reviews.body: The overall look and functionality is good, you can buy it.
